base_prompt: Pixel-art sprite of world_3_1_layout — a tile (level_layout) from 1985 super mario bros. Overworld, night palette (black sky). Centered on magenta (#FF00FF) background, 8-bit or 16-bit pixel-art aesthetic, no anti-aliasing, chunky pixels. Single canonical pose (frame 0 of animation).
source_progression_description: Overworld, night palette (black sky); Hammer-Bros debut on this level throwing arcing hammers.
